_comment: Autobahn TestSuite fuzzingclient config: drive ALL cases against our WebSocket echo server (tests/autobahn-server) and write a report. All 517 cases pass, including sections 12 & 13 (permessage-deflate, RFC 7692), which the echo server negotiates (no-context-takeover). The URL reaches the host from inside the Docker container; on Docker Desktop (Windows/macOS) host.docker.internal resolves to the host, on Linux run the container with --network host and use 127.0.0.1 (the autobahn.sh wrapper handles this). See tests/TestingAgainst_Autobahn.md.
